prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为21270→20040→18705→20276→21627，整体呈先升后降再升的波动走势；2025年基准位次约21627名，较2024年（20276名）后移约1350名，近3年累计波动幅度约3000名，显示该校在广东的录取位次存在较大弹性；该校在广东物理类招生计划2021年4人、2022年5人、2023年5人、2024年20人、2025年17人；2026年计划增至26人，较2025年扩招约52.9%，扩招幅度显著，对位次有较大后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学（盘锦校区）为985、211、双一流高校，共享大连理工大学学科资源；软科中国大学排名（主校区）2026年约第28名，近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，学校层次较高，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉信号显示大连理工大学（主校区）评价偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常；抖音热度总排名第55位（较热），短视频曝光量中等；历史投档异常记录为低关注级别，未见严重断档信号，整体报考心理偏平稳；大连理工大学化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A等10个学科获A-及以上评级；盘锦校区开设的能源化学工程、生物科学类等专业与化学工程与技术、生物学等优势学科高度关联，对相关专业报考有正面吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校工科特色匹配；生化环材类明显劝退；广东省2026年物理类考生约456,000人，较2025年（440,208人）增加约3.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争，2025年物理类本科批436分，近年波动平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次21627名、2026年计划大幅扩招52.9%带来的位次后移压力、广东省物理类考生增加3.6%加剧竞争、学校985层次持续吸引力及声誉偏平稳等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约28297名，区间27797–28797名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（27797–28797名）内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如27000名以内）可重点冲刺能源化学工程等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如28500名以外）建议以三档专业保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 21270 → 20040 → 18705 → 20276 → 21627, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 21627, which is about 1350 places lower than 2024 (20276), with a cumulative fluctuation range of about 3000 places over the past 3 years, indicating significant elasticity in admission rankings for this university in Guangdong; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong was 4 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 17 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 26, an expansion of about 52.9% compared to 2025, which is significant and exerts considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology (Panjin Campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing the disciplinary resources of the main campus of Dalian University of Technology; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (main campus), it ranks approximately 28th, with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years, indicating a high university level that continues to attract candidates; in 2026, reputation signals show a slightly negative evaluation for the main campus of Dalian University of Technology, mainly related to admission gaps or abnormal cutoff scores; Douyin popularity ranks 55th overall (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure; historical abnormal admission records are at a low attention level, with no significant gap signals, and overall application psychology tends to be stable; Dalian University of Technology has 10 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, and Software Engineering A; the Panjin Campus offers majors such as Energy Chemical Engineering and Biological Sciences, which are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines like Chemical Engineering and Technology and Biology, positively attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are consistently highly recommended in society, matching the university's engineering characteristics; majors in Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025 (440,208), with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 436 points, with stable fluctuations in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 21627, the significant downward pressure from the 52.9% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the 3.6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong intensifying competition, the sustained attraction of the 985 university level, and the relatively stable reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be significantly lower than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 28297, with a range of 27797–28797.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (27797–28797), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 27000), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors like Energy Chemical Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 28500), it is recommended to primarily use Tier 3 majors as safety options.
